task_completion.description: Load the three NACA airfoil coordinate files into QBlade.
task_completion.visual_evidence: QBlade interface showing NACA 0015, NACA 2412, and NACA 4412 in the loaded airfoils list, project tree, or foil design module.

task_completion.description: Set the Reynolds number for the XFoil analysis to 1,000,000.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Analysis definition or polar settings window in QBlade showing the Reynolds number (Re) set to 1,000,000 (or 1e6).

task_completion.description: Set the Angle of Attack (AoA) range from -5 to 20 degrees.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Analysis execution panel or sequence settings in QBlade showing the alpha/AoA range with a minimum of -5 and a maximum of 20.

task_completion.description: Execute the XFoil viscous analysis to generate polar data for all three airfoils.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Polar graphs (e.g., Cl vs Cd, Cl vs alpha) displayed in QBlade showing plotted curves for the three airfoils, or the polar list showing successfully generated polars for each airfoil.

task_completion.description: Export the resulting aerodynamic coefficients to the specified text files.
task_completion.visual_evidence: QBlade export dialogs saving to the specified filenames, or a file manager/terminal showing the creation of 'polar_naca0015.txt', 'polar_naca2412.txt', and 'polar_naca4412.txt' in the '/home/ga/Documents/airfoils/' directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the QBlade graphical interface to perform the analysis.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the QBlade application open and being interacted with, rather than running XFoil directly from the terminal or using a pre-written script.

integrity.description: The agent exported the data from QBlade rather than faking the output files.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent should not use terminal commands like 'touch' or 'echo' to create the output text files without actually exporting the data from QBlade.

integrity.description: The exported files contain genuine tabular aerodynamic data.
integrity.visual_evidence: If the contents of the text files are visible, they should display columns of numerical data (alpha, Cl, Cd, etc.) consistent with XFoil/QBlade exports, not empty files or manually typed mock data.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires analyzing NACA 0015, NACA 2412, and NACA 4412 airfoils in QBlade. The analysis must use a Reynolds number of 1,000,000 (1e6) and an Angle of Attack (AoA) range from -5 to 20 degrees. The final outputs must be exported as text files named polar_naca0015.txt, polar_naca2412.txt, and polar_naca4412.txt in the /home/ga/Documents/airfoils/ directory.
